name: Feature Request

title: "[FEATURE] "

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case
Explain the use case and why this feature would be valuable for GRC workflows and compliance management.

## Proposed Solution
Describe your preferred approach or implementation details, if you have any.

## Alternatives Considered
List any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
